actuarial_rationale: Driver age and vehicle age have plausible claim-size relationships, but severity is tail-sensitive. This candidate uses the capped target only and requires cross-fold support before any pricing-level change.
description: Enhanced GLM using natural splines for DriverAge, CarAge, and logDensity in frequency, raw severity, and capped severity; adds DriverAgeBand:CarAgeBand to the capped severity component only.
hypothesis: The GBM interaction review showed large age-by-vehicle-age pure premium differences. Putting this term in capped severity may improve stable loss-cost ranking while leaving frequency calibration intact.
